description: Job Description: As an AI Engineer (Security & Automation), you will be responsible for designing and building intelligent automation systems and AI-driven solutions that enhance security operations, threat detection, and enterprise workflows. You will play a key role in developing AI agents, automation frameworks, and integrating advanced analytics into security platforms such as SIEM and SOAR. You will work closely with engineering, security, and presales teams to translate real-world requirements into scalable AI solutions. Your role spans across the full lifecycle — from concept, development, and integration to optimization and continuous improvement — ensuring that AI capabilities are actionable, reliable, and production-ready. Every point in your technical toolkit — from Python automation, API integration, AI agent development, to system orchestration — is applied through the lens of building intelligent, scalable, and secure systems. Key Responsibilities: AI Agent Development  Design and develop AI agents to automate complex workflows and decision-making processes  Build intelligent systems (e.g., similar to Google Antigravity concepts) to enhance security operations and automation  Integrate AI agents with enterprise platforms such as SIEM, SOAR, and cloud services  Continuously improve agent performance, reliability, and adaptability Automation Framework Development  Design, develop, and maintain automation frameworks using Python  Develop automation harnesses for security use cases such as: o Threat detection o Incident response o Compliance validation  Integrate and automate workflows across: o SIEM platforms o SOAR systems o External APIs and services  Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure framework compatibility and scalability  Continuously optimize automation processes for long-term efficiency and reliability (Optional) API Security: ● Understand WAF deployment models — inline, out-of-band, reverse proxy, and cloud- native (Cloudflare, AWS WAF, F5 NGINX App Protect, Imperva) — to guide prospects on the right architecture for protecting their APIs. ● Understand API vulnerability classes and how each maps to WAF rule sets and API gateway policy controls. ● Understand API security scanning approaches to articulate platform coverage during presales discussions. ● Understand API gateway security fundamentals to support deployment guidance. (Optional) DevSecOps: ● Articulate and demonstrate the value of integrating security into CI/CD pipelines during sales engagements. ● Present solutions around SAST, DAST, SCA, container security, and secrets management in modern DevOps workflows. ● Collaborate with prospect engineering and DevOps teams to run technical evaluations and bake-offs. ● Produce technical documentation including architecture diagrams, integration guides, and security benchmark reports. (Optional) Mobile Application Security: ● Deliver technical presentations and demos on mobile application security testing and runtime protection. ● Assess mobile security posture for iOS and Android environments during proof-of-concept phases. ● Address prospect questions on OWASP Mobile Top 10, binary analysis, certificate pinning, and anti-tampering controls. ● Support the sales team in addressing mobile-first and BYOD security use cases for enterprise clients. Learning and Growth: ● Continuously learn new Python and automation-related technologies. ● Assist in troubleshooting and debugging test cases and scripts. ● Participate in team meetings, code reviews, and Agile processes. Requirements: ● Education: A degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience). ● Strong Python programming skills (experience through academic projects or internships). ● Understanding of: ○ AI/ML fundamentals (basic level acceptable for fresh graduates) ○ APIs and system integration ○ Automation and scripting concepts ● Basic understanding of RESTful APIs and how they work. ● Familiarity with automation tools like SOAR or willingness to learn. ● Problem-solving mindset with an eagerness to learn and improve. ● Excellent communication skills and the ability to work in a team environment.
